title: Understanding the Problem
text: To find the final velocity of the elevator, we need to consider the forces acting on it and any changes in its motion.

title: Consider the Forces
text: The elevator is subject to gravitational force and any force exerted by the cable. If the elevator is at rest or moving at constant velocity, the net force is zero.

title: Net Force and Acceleration
text: If the elevator is moving at constant velocity, the acceleration is zero. This means the net force acting on the elevator is zero.

title: Calculate the Final Velocity
text: Given that the elevator is moving at constant velocity, what is the final velocity?
